name: Reading Room (Chrome Extension)
description: Reading Room Chrome extension pushes user-curated articles into agro_news via POST /api/reading-room/ingest. Articles are tagged confidentiality='agrisafe_published' because they came in through an internal AgriSafe tool. Entity-mention parsing runs algorithm-first via src/lib/entity-matcher.ts (no LLM).
notes: Authenticated via shared secret in x-reading-room-secret header (env READING_ROOM_SECRET). The Chrome extension itself lives at C:\Users\renat\.gemini\antigravity\projects\1 personal\reading-room and is outside this repo. Phase 22.

name: news_sources (registry table)
description: Database-backed registry of news providers (RSS feeds, Reading Room, future API/scraper sources). Replaces the hardcoded NEWS_SOURCES constant in src/data/news.ts. CRUD via /api/news-sources/crud and the AgroNews UI sources panel.
notes: Migration 032_news_sources.sql. Soft-delete only (enabled=false) because agro_news.source_name is plain text. Phase 22.
